package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice suffix checks instead of `bytes.HasSuffix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario452Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.HasSuffix(haystack, needle)
}
